compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava
compiled_state.description:
## What

Add a lightweight CI gate that keeps the docs index honest: every living top-level
`docs/*.md` page must be linked from the central index (`docs/README.md`), with an
explicit allowlist for intentionally-unindexed files (git-ignored `*.local.md`,
historical/archive docs). This drift-proofs the P2 index-completeness finding so it
cannot silently recur. It ALSO validates that relative markdown links within `docs/`
resolve — any relative markdown link within `docs/` that points at a nonexistent
`docs/…` target fails the gate, so a broken relative link cannot slip past the
index-only completeness check. (Sibling `9d81` keeps historical docs in place rather
than moving them, so there are no archive relocations to chase; this general
relative-link check is the durable guard regardless.)

Template the established pattern: `scripts/gen_env_registry.py` + its CI drift gate
show the shape (a small script invoked from `.github/workflows/test.yml` that fails on
divergence).

- Add `scripts/check_docs_index.py` (new): (a) enumerate `docs/*.md`, parse links out
  of `docs/README.md`, diff against an allowlist, exit non-zero on unindexed living
  docs; (b) scan ALL `docs/*.md` for relative markdown links to `docs/…` targets and
  exit non-zero on any that do not resolve to an existing file (general broken-relative-
  link guard within docs/).
- Wire it into BOTH `.github/workflows/test.yml` AND `.github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml`
  (the latter is the actual Gerrit `Verified` gate; it mirrors test.yml's drift gates).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A new script fails when a living top-level `docs/*.md` is not linked from
      `docs/README.md` and not on the allowlist.
- [ ] The allowlist covers `*.local.md` and designated historical/archive docs.
- [ ] The check is wired into CI and passes on the (now-completed) index.
- [ ] Adding a new unindexed doc is caught — DETERMINISTIC proof (prints `CAUGHT`):
      `touch docs/_gate_probe.md; python scripts/check_docs_index.py --check >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "MISS" || echo "CAUGHT"; rm -f docs/_gate_probe.md`
      (a fresh unindexed, non-allowlisted `docs/*.md` makes `--check` exit non-zero).
- [ ] A relative link in any `docs/*.md` pointing at a nonexistent `docs/…` target
      fails the gate — DETERMINISTIC proof (prints `CAUGHT`):
      `printf '[x](./_nope_$$.md)\n' >> docs/README.md; python scripts/check_docs_index.py --check >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo MISS || echo CAUGHT; git checkout -- docs/README.md`

Files: `scripts/check_docs_index.py` (new), `.github/workflows/test.yml`.
compiled_state.title: P1: Add docs index-completeness / dead-link CI gate
